task_completion.description: Verify the item type is set to Treaty
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane of the Jurism application, the 'Item Type' field should display 'Treaty'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane, the 'Title' field should contain exactly 'Vienna Convention on the Law of Treaties'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Short Title is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane, the 'Short Title' field should contain 'VCLT'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Date is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane, the 'Date' field should contain '1969-05-23'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Reporter / Publication is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane, the 'Reporter' or 'Publication' field should contain 'United Nations Treaty Series'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Volume is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane, the 'Volume' field should contain '1155'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Page is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand pane, the 'Pages' or 'Page' field should contain '331'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jurism application GUI to add the item
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jurism application window with its distinct three-pane layout, not a terminal or command-line interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata must be entered into the actual Jurism input fields, not typed into a text editor like Gedit, Nano, or a generic document.

integrity.description: Verify the item is actually present in the Jurism library list
integrity.visual_evidence: The middle pane of the Jurism window should show a row entry for 'Vienna Convention on the Law of Treaties', indicating it was actually created and saved in the library.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target item is a real international treaty. Verify the following exact values in the Jurism interface: Item Type: 'Treaty'; Title: 'Vienna Convention on the Law of Treaties'; Short Title: 'VCLT'; Date: '1969-05-23'; Reporter/Publication: 'United Nations Treaty Series'; Volume: '1155'; Page: '331'.
